genericOption: None of the above / Not sure

questions.clue: We are heading out for a team lunch and will be coming back to the office afterwards. It's happy hour - can we have a small alcoholic drink?
options: No, working under the influence is not allowed.
Yes, as long as it's within permissible limits and outside office premises.

questions.clue: What are the primary stages involved in the process of money laundering?
options: Placement, Layering, Integration
Placement, Layering, Structuring, Integration

questions.clue: What is the term for "informing a customer about a suspicious activity investigation on their account"?
options: Tipping off
Customer Notification

questions.clue: Under which key legislation in India are Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations primarily mandated for financial institutions?
options: SEBI Act
Prevention of Money Laundering Act

questions.clue: The process of making illegally obtained funds appear legitimate & clean is known as _________.
options: Money laundering
Identity theft

questions.clue: What is the primary purpose of PhonePe's KYC policy?
options: To attract a large number of new customers quickly.
To conduct due diligence, crucial for vetting potential customers.

questions.clue: When are PhonePe-rs expected to report suspicious activities?
options: Only if a large sum of money is involved.
If you suspect a customer is involved in money laundering or terrorist financing.

questions.clue: You receive an anonymous tip alleging that a vendor intentionally falsified import documents to conceal the actual value of goods. What type of violation does this most likely represent?
options: Trade Non-Compliance
Insider Trading

questions.clue: PhonePe's Global Trade Compliance Policy prohibits conducting business with which of the following?
options: New start-ups in emerging markets.
Individuals or entities identified as sanctioned by applicable law.

questions.clue: Who is responsible for following PhonePe's Trade Compliance Policy?
options: Only the Trade Compliance team.
Employees who oversee or support imports/exports, including product development, buying, sourcing, logistics, etc.

questions.clue: What is the full form of KYC as per RBI?
options: Know Your Customer
Know Your Client

questions.clue: An employee is approached by a competitor at a supplier event. The competitor suggests that they should agree on pricing and the employee accepts. Identify the violation.
options: Antitrust
Bribery

questions.clue: A PhonePe-r knew about possible bribery but did not inform Ethics. What violation did the employee commit?
options: Corruption
Failure to Report

questions.clue: An invoice for marketing licenses contains a line item for "Miscellaneous Expenses" totalling INR 500, lacking supporting documentation. How should you proceed?
options: Do not process the invoice. Return it for further details and explanation.
Complete processing since the expense is minor and will not make a difference.

questions.clue: While working on a project, a police supervisor suggests paying a "small tip" to ensure quicker response times from assigned officers. How should you proceed?
options: Pay the "tip" as it is a customary local practice.
Refuse to pay the "tip" and report solicitation to Ethics immediately.

questions.clue: A government officer requests a donation to his private foundation, stating it would significantly expedite your project's progress. What should you do?
options: Decline the request, but no need report it as no bribe exchange took place.
Decline bribe solicitation and immediately report it to Ethics.

questions.clue: With the festive season approaching, your team is considering sending the SEBI Officer a "PhonePe Gift Card" to build business relations. Is this allowed?
options: No, we never bribe to influence the actions of government officials/officers.
Till the time the gift card value is under INR 1000 value.

questions.clue: PhonePe's Anti-Corruption Compliance Procedures outline the process for engaging Third-Party Intermediaries ("TPIs"). Which option below qualifies as a TPI?
options: A vendor that interacts with a government official / entity on PhonePe's behalf.
A software vendor that interacts only with PhonePe employees.

questions.clue: What types of "donations" are prohibited as per PhonePe's Anti-Corruption Policy?
options: Food, Goods, and Services, such as volunteering.
Physical cash, gift cards, alcohol, and tobacco.

questions.clue: A government official offered to ensure PhonePe faces "no hassle in any regulatory audits" if his daughter's resume was forwarded to the recruiting team. What should you do?
options: Accept the resume and forward it to the recruiting team as requested.
Decline the offer and report it to Ethics.

questions.clue: The three Immediately Reportable Criteria (IRCs) per the Code of Conduct are: 1. Bribery 2. Financial Integrity 3. ________________
options: Any violation of Code by CEO or CEO's direct reports.
Sexual harassment

questions.clue: You can reach out to Ethics by 1. Visiting: www.phonepeethics.com, 2. Calling: 1800-102-1482, or 3. Emailing: __________________.
options: ethics@phonepe.com
phonepe@ethics.com

questions.clue: The Code of Conduct applies to _____________.
options: All PhonePe employees, subsidiaries, and board members acting in their director capacity.
All PhonePe employees and subsidiaries except the leadership and board members.

questions.clue: How can I reach out to the Ethics team?
options: By emailing ethics@phonepe.com or calling the hotline 1800-102-1482
By emailing ethics@phonepe.com, calling the hotline 1800-102-1482, or visiting www.phonepeethics.com

questions.clue: My vendor offered to lower cost proposal in exchange for his son's employment at PhonePe. Is this acceptable?
options: No, as it constitutes quid pro quo and creates a conflict of interest.
Yes, provided the son is qualified for the position.

questions.clue: An employee offers a gift bag to vendor in exchange for receiving a lower price for the service. Identify a violation.
options: Financial Integrity
Commercial Bribery

questions.clue: A situation where personal interests interfere with, or may appear to interfere with, an employee's work at PhonePe is ________
options: Conflict of Interest
Fraud

questions.clue: Is using PhonePe resources (laptop, supplies, work time) for personal blogging a potential conflict of interest?
options: No, till the time it does not interfere with work productivity.
Yes, this is a violation.

questions.clue: I work in Financial Services, and I received a birthday gift from a friend who is also a vendor for PhonePe in the Engineering department. Can I keep the gift?
options: Yes, you can if in your job, you have no influence over PhonePe's business relationship with this vendor.
No, as this is a conflict.

questions.clue: A PhonePe-r is involved in selecting and onboarding a vendor whose owner is a family member. Is it a conflict of interest?
options: Yes, employee must disclose any family association with a vendor.
No disclosure is required.

questions.clue: A PhonePe-r accepts a Diwali gift from a vendor they actively manage. Identify the violation
options: COI - Supplier relationship
COI - Gift from Supplier

questions.clue: Is it a policy violation to financially invest in a PhonePe vendor you work with?
options: Yes, it's a policy violation because it creates a direct conflict of interest.
No, it's generally allowed, provided the investment is small.

questions.clue: A vendor you directly work with offered you movie tickets for sustaining the business relationship. Can you accept them?
options: No, accepting the tickets could be seen as an influence on the business relationship.
Yes, accepting the tickets is fine as long as it is outside the office premises.

questions.clue: My manager has a romantic relationship with their direct reportee. This seems to be undisclosed but can I report this?
options: No, it is a Conflict of Interest.
No, you should not report this as it is a private matter between them.

questions.clue: I have been invited to participate in a panel discussion at my member association. Can I proceed with this engagement?
options: Yes, as long as there is no media present.
Reach out to Ethics and Corporate Communications before accepting.

questions.clue: For Conflict of interest policy, __________ means any business that offers the same or similar products or services to the same potential market or customer.
options: Competitor
Supplier

questions.clue: Which scenario most clearly qualifies as a Conflict of Interest?
options: Accepting gifts from a vendor with whom you have an active business relationship.
Accepting product samples from a potential vendor for evaluation purposes.

questions.clue: Both close friendships and family relationships can create potential conflicts of interest.
options: True, both can lead to a conflict of interest.
False, only family relationships can qualify as a conflict of interest.

questions.clue: Samples received from potential vendors to evaluate potential products can be used for personal or business use.
options: True, samples can be used for personal/business use after evaluation.
False, all samples must be returned to vendor after evaluation.

questions.clue: Identify this policy that prohibits discrimination and harassment and promotes a workplace that is free of discrimination or harassment based on protected status.
options: Prevention of Sexual harassment at Workplace Policy
Discrimination & Harassment Prevention Policy

questions.clue: For a role, the hiring manager refused to hire qualified candidates above the age of 40. Identify the discrimination.
options: Discrimination based on age
Discrimination based on gender

questions.clue: Can a PhonePe-r who identifies as "transexual" raise a sexual harassment concern with Ethics?
options: No, as current legal provisions do not support such complaints.
Yes, such a complaint is recognized as a violation of the Code of Conduct.

questions.clue: A hiring manager rejects a job candidate solely because she uses a wheelchair. Identify the type of "discrimination".
options: Discrimination based on gender
Discrimination based on disability

questions.clue: An employee received a poor appraisal due to being on maternity leave. Identify the type of "discrimination".
options: Discrimination based on gender
Discrimination based on gender identity

questions.clue: A manager makes belittling comments about an employee's accent, targeting their national origin. Identify the type of "harassment".
options: Discrimination & harassment based on religion
Discrimination & harassment based on race, ethnicity, and national origin

questions.clue: An employee is mocked and excluded by colleagues due to their sexual orientation. Identify the type of "discrimination".
options: Discrimination based on gender
Discrimination based on gender identity

questions.clue: The office fire exit is blocked by cardboard cartons. Should I report this?
options: You should ignore it as it is not your responsibility.
Yes, immediately report the blocked fire exit to your manager, facilities, or building management, as it's a serious safety hazard.

questions.clue: Small sparks are coming from the cafeteria toaster. Should I report this?
options: Ignore it - as it is a small spark.
Reach out to Compliance as it's a safety hazard.

questions.clue: What is the primary purpose of an Environment, Health & Safety (EHS) program in the workplace?
options: Ensure compliance with laws and regulations
Reduce operational costs

questions.clue: What is the primary benefit of conducting regular safety drills?
options: To prepare employees for emergencies
To increase productivity

questions.clue: Which of the following is a key component of an effective waste management program?
options: Disposing of all waste in a single bin
Practicing waste segregation

questions.clue: Is it okay to "smooth out" our financial information so "good months" can help our "bad months"?
options: No, as this is a violation of financial integrity and is considered fraud.
Yes, if it has a good long-term financial impact.

questions.clue: Is it permissible to enter inaccurate accounting information to balance departmental financial records?
options: No, entering inaccurate accounting information is strictly prohibited as it constitutes financial misconduct.
Yes, it's acceptable if it helps balance the books and is a minor adjustment.

questions.clue: Which scenario qualifies to be a "financial integrity" violation?
options: Manipulating tax balances.
Fraudulent onboarding of merchants.

questions.clue: An employee producing forged medical documents to extend the leave/work from home. Identify the violation.
options: Conflict of Interest
Fraud

questions.clue: What is "phishing" mean in the context of IT security?
options: A cybercrime where attackers trick individuals into revealing sensitive information, often through deceptive emails or websites.
A type of software that helps analyse network traffic for security vulnerabilities.

questions.clue: You receive an email requesting your password via a link for a routine security check. What is your immediate action?
options: Check with IT to verify its authenticity before taking any action.
Click the link and enter your password, as it's a routine security check.

questions.clue: What is the significance of 'third-party risk management' in technology compliance?
options: To ensure that vendors and partners also comply with relevant PhonePe's security and privacy requirements.
To completely avoid using any third-party services.

questions.clue: Which of these best describes a 'vulnerability' in cybersecurity?
options: A weakness in a system that can be exploited by a threat.
A hacker trying to break into computer systems.

questions.clue: What is the primary purpose of a 'risk assessment' in the context of technology risk and compliance?
options: To identify, analyse, and evaluate potential risks to PhonePe's information systems.
To implement security controls without prior analysis.

questions.clue: Which organization in India is responsible for enforcing compliance with labour laws in workplaces?
options: Ministry of Labour and Employment
Labour Welfare Board

questions.clue: According to the Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972, how many years of continuous service are required for an employee to be eligible for gratuity?
options: 7 years
5 years

questions.clue: According to the Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013, who is responsible for ensuring a safe working environment for women?
options: Women employees
Employer

questions.clue: Which legislation mandates the provision of maternity benefits to female employees in India?
options: Maternity Benefit Act, 1961
Child Labour (Prohibition and Regulation) Act, 1986

questions.clue: Which legislation prohibits discrimination in employment based on gender in India?
options: Equal Remuneration Act, 1976
Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013

questions.clue: What is the primary purpose of the Employees' Provident Fund (EPF)?
options: To provide short-term loans to employees for personal expenses.
To build a retirement collection for employees through regular salary collection.

questions.clue: Which primary license is mandatory for all businesses in India, including IT firms?
options: Pollution Control Board License
Shops and Establishment License

questions.clue: What is the primary purpose of "Trademark Registration" for an IT company?
options: To protect the company's brand identity
To register employees

questions.clue: An ex-colleague frequently shares competitor 'intel' with our team. Is accepting this information permissible?
options: It's okay, as long as you keep the information vague and general.
No, any such information is confidential and should not be discussed.

questions.clue: What violation occurs if a manager shares their login password with a team member to complete training?
options: Mishandling Business Information
Conflict of Interest

questions.clue: Price, discounts, profit margins, sales volumes are examples of ____________.
options: Personal Identifiable Information
Competitively Sensitive Information

questions.clue: Select an example of a confidential data.
options: Employee's social security number
A press release about a new product

questions.clue: How is "access control" defined in a tech company?
options: Regulating the types of devices employees use.
Managing who can view or use certain resources or information.

questions.clue: What violation occurs if a PhonePe-r discloses health information without authorization?
options: Mishandling Business Information
Fraud

questions.clue: Following are the examples of Sensitive Personal Identifiable Information.
options: Medical records, biometric data, Financial information
Zip Code, birth date, geographical details

questions.clue: Which of these is not a best practice when trying to protect your privacy?
options: Writing and storing your passwords on sticky notes
Using a strong passphrase

questions.clue: Why is it important to have a privacy policy?
options: To increase website traffic.
To inform users how their data will be used.

questions.clue: A customer emails you requesting for their personal data stored by your company. How should you respond?
options: Inform them that you cannot share any information due to company policy.
Verify their identity and then provide the requested information in accordance with internal policies, processes, and applicable laws.

questions.clue: Which of the following is a privacy violation?
options: News app asking for camera access.
Banking app accessing your location for login purposes.

questions.clue: Who is responsible for ensuring data privacy at PhonePe?
options: Compliance, HR and Legal
Every PhonePe-r

questions.clue: When sharing any customer data, ensure maximum stakeholders are looped in for visibility to prevent future escalations.
options: True, include maximum people for visibility to ensure broader awareness and prevent future issues.
False, only share customer data with minimum necessary individuals who have a legitimate business need.

questions.clue: Select the action that is an example of retaliation after raising a an ethics concern.
options: Threatening to give a negative performance review.
Checking in on a task that was due yesterday.

questions.clue: Is ridiculing an employee who has raised a concern considered a violation of PhonePe's Code of Conduct?
options: No, it is considered acceptable as fun and banter.
Yes, it constitutes a form of retaliation.

questions.clue: My manager was disciplined for using offensive language at work. He informed us that they were receiving poor reviews because of this. Can I report this?
options: No, as the management will be take care of it.
Yes, reach out and report it to Ethics as this is retaliation.

questions.clue: I'm hesitant to report a concern about a leader due to fear of retaliation. What steps should I take?
options: Voice your concerns to Ethics. PhonePe has zero tolerance to retaliation.
Ignore the concern, as it could be detrimental to your career.

questions.clue: I spoke up and raised my concern about a leader. I feel my peers are holding this against me. What should I do?
options: Remain quiet - the management will take care of it.
If you feel retaliated - report it to Ethics.

questions.clue: ___________ means any place visited by the employee arising out of or during the course of employment, as per POSH Policy.
options: Internal Committee
Workplace

questions.clue: Which scenario would be classified as sexual harassment in the workplace?
options: Humiliation for not meeting work deadlines or targets.
Humiliation due to the employee's refusal of a demand for sexual favours.

questions.clue: Third parties, such as visitors or contractors, are NOT covered by the POSH policy.
options: True, the policy only applies to PhonePe-rs
False, the policy extends to third-parties such as visitors and contractors

questions.clue: A senior employee demanding sexual favours from a junior employee in exchange for preferential treatment is ____________.
options: Quid pro quo
Hostile environment

questions.clue: A complainant should make a complaint of Sexual Harassment at the Workplace to the IC within a period of __________ from the date of the incident.
options: 3 weeks
3 months

questions.clue: The 'Workplace,' as per the Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Policy, includes just the PhonePe's physical office premises.
options: TRUE, only PhonePe's physical office premises are covered.
FALSE, it includes extended workplace such work from home, official offsites, etc.

questions.clue: An employee constantly stares at the body parts of a female colleague, making her uncomfortable. Identify the form of sexual harassment.
options: Physical Sexual Harassment
Visual/non-verbal Sexual Harassment

questions.clue: An employee habitually leads female colleagues by the waist when exiting the lift, causing discomfort. What type of sexual harassment is this?
options: Verbal sexual harassment
Physical sexual harassment

questions.clue: ______________ and _________________ amount to workplace harassment while ___________________ amounts to sexual harassment.
options: Discrimination; displaying explicit sexual material; victimisation
Discrimination; victimisation; displaying explicit sexual material

questions.clue: Is there a duty to report witnessed sexual harassment?
options: Yes, you are encouraged to report any witnessed sexual harassment to maintain a safe workplace.
No, there's no duty. You can report if you are directly targeted.

questions.clue: PhonePe's POSH Policy does not cover remote working/work-from-home (WFH) scenarios.
options: True, PhonePe's POSH Policy extends to remote and WFH environments.
False, the POSH Policy applies only to physical office premises.

questions.clue: At PhonePe, genders aside from female, cannot report a concern on sexual harassment.
options: True, only female employees are permitted to report sexual harassment concerns under PhonePe's policy.
False, PhonePe's sexual harassment policy covers all genders, allowing anyone to report concerns.

questions.clue: In POSH proceedings, the Complainant will be liable for appropriate disciplinary action if the complaint of sexual harassment is found to be __________________.
options: Inconclusive
False and malicious

questions.clue: During POSH proceedings before the Internal Committee, parties are permitted to bring a legal practitioner to represent them.
options: True, parties have the right to bring a legal practitioner to represent them during POSH proceedings.
False, legal practitioners are not allowed for representation.
